info.title: PredSea MVP API
info.description: File-backed API for PredSea route evidence, briefings, and captain questions.

post.summary: Register pre-calculated active anomaly or official warnings
post.description: Allows ingestion pipelines or scripts to push pre-calculated active warning items directly to the API.

schema.title: Response Post Warnings Active Endpoint Warnings Active Post

get.summary: Operational warnings from official alerts and anomaly detection
get.description: Combine AEMET official CAP alerts with PredSea anomaly warnings computed from the latest evidence rows and climatology baseline.
Return the canonical place registry used by PredSea for weather lookups, route planning, and coordinate resolution.

parameters.name: max_distance

schema.description: Max proximity distance threshold in Nautical Miles
schema.title: Max Distance

parameters.description: Max proximity distance threshold in Nautical Miles

parameters.name: radius

schema.description: Max proximity distance threshold in Nautical Miles
schema.title: Radius

parameters.description: Max proximity distance threshold in Nautical Miles

get.summary: Weather for a raw GPS position
get.description: Return the nearest supported place-weather package for a raw latitude and longitude pair. The request must include both coordinates.

get.summary: Get navigable route waypoints between two places
get.description: Return the navigable sea-route geometry between two places as an ordered list of waypoints. You can call the endpoint with place IDs only, or provide raw latitude/longitude overrides for either side on day one. When coordinates are supplied, PredSea uses the exact locations instead of the place registry resolution.

parameters.name: departure_time

schema.description: Local departure time used to compute ETA at each route checkpoint.
schema.title: Departure Time

parameters.description: Local departure time used to compute ETA at each route checkpoint.

parameters.name: origin_latitude

schema.description: Optional raw latitude for the origin. If provided, it overrides the origin place ID.
schema.title: Origin Latitude

parameters.description: Optional raw latitude for the origin. If provided, it overrides the origin place ID.

parameters.name: origin_longitude

schema.description: Optional raw longitude for the origin. If provided, it overrides the origin place ID.
schema.title: Origin Longitude

parameters.description: Optional raw longitude for the origin. If provided, it overrides the origin place ID.

parameters.name: destination_latitude

schema.description: Optional raw latitude for the destination. If provided, it overrides the destination place ID.
schema.title: Destination Latitude

parameters.description: Optional raw latitude for the destination. If provided, it overrides the destination place ID.

parameters.name: destination_longitude

schema.description: Optional raw longitude for the destination. If provided, it overrides the destination place ID.
schema.title: Destination Longitude

parameters.description: Optional raw longitude for the destination. If provided, it overrides the destination place ID.

parameters.name: typical_speed_kn

schema.description: Typical vessel speed used to estimate travel time when the route geometry is returned.
schema.title: Typical Speed Kn

parameters.description: Typical vessel speed used to estimate travel time when the route geometry is returned.

get.description:
Real observation stations (buoys, tide gauges, HF radar, EMODnet platforms)
with their most recent real observed value, read live from BigQuery.

Never fabricates: a station with no recent real observation for the requested
variable is returned with an empty `observations` dict for that variable, not a
guessed value. If BigQuery isn't reachable, this returns 503 rather than a
placeholder station list.

Run real-time forecast evaluation against buoy/station observations.

Allows filtering by observation location/station name, evaluation date, and time range.
Does not fabricate or use synthetic data.

post.summary: Location question from a shared GPS position
post.description: Phase 1 location intelligence. The request must include latitude and longitude. PredSea samples the nearest forecast map grids around that position and returns a conservative operational read.

post.summary: Route question from stored passage evidence
post.description: Answer a captain question from the latest stored route evidence package. Use this for named passages such as Palma to Ibiza.

question.title: Question
question.description: Captain question about a shared GPS position.

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: Required shared GPS latitude for the location question.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: Required shared GPS longitude for the location question.

wind_kn.title: Wind Kn
wind_kn.description: Optional observed wind speed. Present only when the selected observation source provides it.

wind_gust_kn.title: Wind Gust Kn
wind_gust_kn.description: Optional observed wind gust speed in knots. Present only when the selected observation source provides it.

wind_direction_deg.title: Wind Direction Deg
wind_direction_deg.description: Optional observed wind direction in degrees. Present only when the selected observation source provides it.

water_temperature_c.title: Water Temperature C
water_temperature_c.description: Optional observed water temperature in Celsius. Present only when the selected observation source provides it.

air_temperature_c.title: Air Temperature C
air_temperature_c.description: Optional observed air temperature in Celsius. Present only when the selected observation source provides it.

current_kn.title: Current Kn
current_kn.description: Current speed in knots from the forecast layer when available.

current_direction_deg.title: Current Direction Deg
current_direction_deg.description: Current flow direction in degrees from the forecast layer when available.

question.title: Question
question.description: Captain question about a stored route snapshot.

current_latitude.title: Current Latitude
current_latitude.description: Optional shared GPS latitude used by route questions when the current position matters.

current_longitude.title: Current Longitude
current_longitude.description: Optional shared GPS longitude used by route questions when the current position matters.
